name: Boss is mad I got hurt by forklift and threatening my job, is that legal?
description: Illegal retaliation; report to Utah Labor Commission immediately.

mainEntity.name: Boss is mad I got hurt by forklift and threatening my job, is that legal?

acceptedAnswer.text: Illegal retaliation; report to Utah Labor Commission immediately.
acceptedAnswer.description: No, Utah prohibits retaliation for workers' comp claims; file complaint with Labor Commission.[5] Context: Common in high-pressure jobs. Key factors: Timing of discipline proves retaliation. Practical guidance: Document threats; attorney files anti-retaliation claim for backpay/job protection. Don't quit.
